references.role: structural Licorn kitchen context for all segments
references.prompt: Preserve cabinet layout, terrazzo palette, and lighting; not a mandatory wide camera framing.

references.role: hero island terrazzo and countertop identity
references.prompt: Light terrazzo island surface, black flush induction unchanged.
Top-down island view for batter pour and donut pan fill.

references.role: pre-open oven context for tray slide
references.prompt: Oven already open; no door hinge action in generation.

references.role: baked donut ring reveal and texture checks
references.prompt: Close baked mochi ring tops inside oven cavity.
Balloon whisk only; no invented beaters.

references.role: glaze stir and small bowl actions
references.prompt: Tablespoon scale spoon for glaze bowl.
Character identity only; hands empty near food in hero.
Three-quarter right, pleased, not touching donuts.
Video reference for standardized outro only.

references.role: pourable violet mochi batter viscosity and color
references.prompt: Generate one vertical 9:16 reference still of pourable violet-lilac mochi donut batter in a glass measuring cup with spout on the Licorn terrazzo island. Batter is glossy, slightly elastic, homogenous deep purple, not pink. No character. No donut pan yet.

references.role: six raw filled metal donut rings flush to pan lip
references.prompt: Generate one overhead 9:16 reference still of a light metal six-cavity donut pan on terrazzo, each ring filled to the brim with glossy violet batter, flat meniscus tops, no overflow. Outer ring diameter 3 inches / 7.5 cm, center hole 1 inch / 2.5 cm. Exactly six rings. No character.

references.role: baked target topology after oven hard cut
references.prompt: Generate one 9:16 reference still of six baked ube mochi donuts on a wire rack: matte lilac-violet rings, lightly cracked tops, flat bottoms, minimal rise, crispy mochi shell look. Same 3 in / 7.5 cm ring scale. Faint steam optional. No glaze. No character.

references.role: single glazed crown with sprinkles for dip beat
references.prompt: Generate one macro 9:16 reference still of one ube mochi donut crown dipped in glossy lavender glaze with festive mixed sprinkles on top, intact ring geometry, flat base hidden. No bite. No character hands.

references.role: finished dish identity for hero and canonical outro
references.prompt:
Six glazed ube mochi donuts with violet icing and festive sprinkles on a wire rack on the Licorn terrazzo island, crowns glossy and intact, motionless, no character touch.

Generate one vertical 9:16 hero still: wire rack with exactly six matching rings, outer diameter 3 in / 7.5 cm, flat bases, deep lilac glaze, mixed sprinkle tops, Licorn kitchen terrazzo and soft daylight. No hands, no bite, no text.
